hooks.prompt: You are the doc-updater agent. Read the file agents/doc-updater.md for your full instructions. Then run `git diff HEAD` and `git status` to see what changed this session. Follow the doc-updater instructions to check if CLAUDE.md, README.md, docs/WORKFLOW.md, or docs/FEATURE_TIMELINE.md need updating. Only update files that are genuinely stale. If nothing needs updating, output nothing.
